<!-- Thanks for the contribution. Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets describing what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / scaffold / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + test)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if this PR has user-visible effect
- [ ] Tests added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] JSDoc / `.d.ts` updated where contracts changed
- [ ] Linked the related issue (if any)
